name: Fettuccine Alla Romana
recipeIngredient: 1 Meaty Short Rib of Beef (about 1 lb), cut into bite-sized pieces
1/2 Pound Chicken Livers, rinsed and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat off the short rib of beef and cut into bite-sized pieces. Set aside.
2. Heat olive oil in a large, deep skillet over medium heat. Add onion, carrots, celery, and garlic. Cook for about 15 minutes or until soft.
3. Break up the sausages and add to the vegetables. Add the reserved short rib pieces, chicken livers, ground beef, and pork to the skillet. Cook, stirring occasionally, until browned, about 20 minutes.
4. Add wine and increase heat to high. Cook uncovered for 20 minutes.
5. Stir in tomatoes (crushing with the back of a spoon) and reduce heat to low. Simmer covered partially for 45 minutes. Add water if needed.
6. Soak dried porcini mushrooms in hot water for 20 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon, rinse well, and chop.
7. Add chopped mushrooms to the simmering sauce.
8. Pour mushroom liquid through a sieve lined with a coffee filter into the sauce.
9. Cook uncovered for another 45 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
10. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook fettuccine until al-dente (about 8-10 minutes). Drain well and add to the serving bowl. Pour sauce over and toss to coat. Serve either topped with Parmesan or serve cheese on the side.
